{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/63083086?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/brodmart", "id": 63083086, "login": "brodmart", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjYzMDgzMDg2", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44019", "cvss": {"score": 8.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-73", "name": "External Control of File Name or Path"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}], "description": "### Impact
In versions `>= 2.5.0, < 2.74.1`, `docling-core`  could allow local `file://` image references and accepted inline `data:` content without a decoded-size limit.

In applications that accept untrusted image references, this may allow access to local files readable by the process or excessive memory use from large inline payloads.

### Patches
Patched in `docling-core` `2.74.1`.
The fix blocks local file URIs by default and adds a size limit for decoded inline image data.

Users should upgrade to:
- `docling-core` `>= 2.74.1`

### Workarounds
If upgrading is not immediately possible:
- reject `file:` and `data:` image references from untrusted input
- allow only approved local or remote image sources
- apply input size and memory limits to processing workers

### References
- Fix release: [`v2.74.1`](https://github.com/docling-project/docling-core/releases/tag/v2.74.1)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00235, "percentile": 0.14414}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-j5xp-7m2f-49jv", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-03T21:15:31Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j5xp-7m2f-49jv", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-j5xp-7m2f-49jv"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44019"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-03T21:15:31Z", "references": ["https://github.com/docling-project/docling-core/security/advisories/GHSA-j5xp-7m2f-49jv", "https://github.com/docling-project/docling-core/releases/tag/v2.74.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j5xp-7m2f-49jv"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/docling-project/docling-core/security-advisories/GHSA-j5xp-7m2f-49jv", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/docling-project/docling-core", "summary": "Docling Core: Insufficient validation of image reference URIs", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-03T21:15:33Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-j5xp-7m2f-49jv", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.74.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "docling-core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.5.0, < 2.74.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Docling Core: Insufficient validation of image reference URIs
